player_ship.notes: Player craft. Nose points toward positive Y in game space. Keep wings inside the current mobile safe width.

enemy_drone.notes: Light common enemy. Must stay readable at small screen sizes.

enemy_skimmer.notes: Fast light enemy variant with a narrow silhouette.

enemy_sentinel.notes: Heavy enemy variant. Wider than drones but should not hide bullets.

enemy_wraith.notes: Slender special enemy. Should read differently from the skimmer.

boss_01.notes: Broad first Boss. Keep the center cannon and wings obvious from the top-down camera.

boss_02.notes: Heavy second Boss. Should feel armored and different from boss_01.

boss_03.notes: Long third Boss. Should have a strong spine or flagship silhouette.
